item.title: KMiri: revert recent fixes to leave clean state for return value allocation rework
item.body: This PR reverts recent fixes like https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/pull/16 and https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/pull/15 for rework, keeping some useful improvements.

repo.name: miri
repo.description: [A forked miri for OS] An interpreter for Rust's mid-level intermediate representation

repo.name: miri

issue.title: KMiri: revert recent fixes to leave clean state for return value allocation rework
issue.body: This PR reverts recent fixes like https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/pull/16 and https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/pull/15 for rework, keeping some useful improvements.

commit.message:
Revert "Merge pull request #16 from KMiri-rs/fix-resource-exhaustion"

This reverts commit 91b4f3f9c8ff1e267a005fd759b9153992cf2024, reversing
changes made to 68d1819d5b31f87467daae345e506c54e009365e.

Revert "kmiri(mirch): enlarge kernel stack range to 50MB and move it to last"

This reverts commit 26e55ef2da9d930880601924d1d212715c7c33de.
kmiri: fix the condition during the conflict of int_to_ptr_map insertion
